2013 installationpublic artresidency

Story So Far

Temporary installation by the construction site of the Cricoteka museum, staged as its first museum space open to the public. Part of the ArtBoom festival of public art, Krakow, Poland. Curator: Łukasz Białkowski. Mirrors, steel pipes, plywood.

Festival catalogue entry (PDF)
